title: Resolve the Harness rebrand pull-request conflict
goal: Merge the current main branch into PR #9, resolve conflicts without regressing Harness rebrand behavior, and return the pull request to a clean mergeable state.

acceptanceCriteria.description: The PR branch incorporates origin/main and contains no unresolved conflict markers while preserving the intended Harness hrn CLI, quiet startup, and visible-progress behavior.
Repository-required tests pass after conflict resolution.
PR #9 is open and GitHub reports it as mergeable without conflicts.

workUnits.title: Merge current main and resolve conflicts
Run regression tests and verify PR mergeability
